expectations.text: Agent uses podman to run PMD CPD
expectations.evidence: Agent summary reports command: 'podman run --rm -v ... docker.io/pmdcode/pmd:latest cpd ...'

expectations.text: Agent correctly uses PMD 7.x CPD flag --dir
CPD report file is generated and non-empty
expectations.evidence: cpd-report.txt exists at outputs/, 1685 bytes with 2 duplication groups.

expectations.text: Duplicate code blocks between UserService and ProfileService detected
expectations.evidence: Group 1 shows ProfileService.java:14 and UserService.java:14 as a 101-token duplication.

expectations.text: Report mentions at least 2 duplication groups
expectations.evidence: 2 groups found: 16 lines (101 tokens) and 14 lines (99 tokens).
